name: Transform data between formats
task: Create /tmp/eval_transform.py that reads /tmp/eval_data.csv and writes /tmp/eval_data.json with the data grouped by department. Output format: {"Engineering": [{"name": "Alice", "email": "alice@co.com"}, ...], "Marketing": [...]}. Run the script after creating it.

validation.script: import json; data = json.load(open('/tmp/eval_data.json')); assert 'Engineering' in data; assert 'Marketing' in data; assert len(data['Engineering']) == 2; assert len(data['Marketing']) == 2; assert data['Engineering'][0]['name'] == 'Alice'; print('OK')
